# Gemini OCR Hallucination Fixtures

These 17 files are quarantine samples containing various hallucination patterns generated by vision-LLM OCR on dense print. They are split into:
- 10 large repetition-loops (caught by shadow uniqueness check)
- 6 single-line repetition-loops (caught by substring-repetition check)
- 1 semantic hallucination (fake cognates, caught by ESUM MCP fact-check)
